title: Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics Dogs Rottweiler (Medium, Black/ Tan)
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics, Dogs - medium lying Rottweiler
Black and tan soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details to the face
Part of the Yomiko Classics lifelike animals collections
description: Product Description Supersoft plush medium lying Rottweiler Dog from Suki Gifts famous Yomiko Classics Dog collection. Premium quality caress soft black and tan plush Rottweiler with realistic features and airbrushed details to the face. Yomiko Classics are a world famous brand offering a broad collection of realistically styled animals, many of which are uniquely enhanced with air brushed features. Approximately 14 inches (35.6 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Yomiko Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Safety Warning Please remove all tags before giving to a child Box Contains 1 x Suki Gifts Yomiko Classics medium lying Rottweiler Dog soft toy See more
